basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's and Bachelor's degree in Chemical/Mechanical/Materials/Production Engineering/Electrochemistry or related disciplines from a recognised university with first class, GATE/NET qualified (for JRF)
qualification.details: Master's and Bachelor's degree in Chemical/Mechanical/Materials/Production Engineering/Electrochemistry or related disciplines from a recognised university with first class. For JRF: GATE/NET qualified. Desirable: A good understanding of electrochemistry, corrosion, and mathematical-computational analysis.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I)

salary_details.details: For JRF: Rs. 37000 + 20% HRA Per Month For PA I: Rs. 30000 + 20% HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut JRF/PA I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting your application via email is 12th July 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the JRF and PA I positions?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, the salary is Rs. 37,000 per month plus 20% HRA. For the Project Associate I (PA I) position, the salary is Rs. 30,000 per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's and Bachelor's degree in Chemical, Mechanical, Materials, Production Engineering, or Electrochemistry or related disciplines from a recognized university with first-class marks. For the JRF position, GATE/NET qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF/PA I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for the interview based on their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate I (PA I) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications along with required documents to the official email address provided by NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q8. What is the desirable qualification for the JRF/PA I posts?
faq.answer: A good understanding of electrochemistry, corrosion, and mathematical-computational analysis is considered desirable for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the National Institute of Technology Calicut, Calicut, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state can apply for this position as long as they meet the eligibility criteria. The recruitment is being conducted by NIT Calicut, which is a national institute.
